name: Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, corn meal, onion powder, salt, milk, egg, and water in a large mixing bowl. Stir well until there are no lumps.
2. Add food coloring if desired for a more vibrant color in the finished batter.
3. Slice the onions into thick rounds (about 1/2 inch).
4. Use only the outer onion rings for best appearance and dip them into the batter.
5. Drop the coated rings into a deep fryer and cook until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels and serve. Great with Bar-B-Que!
